twoFactorRequired.title: 2-Factor Required
twoFactorRequired.message: Your account must have two-factor authentication enabled in order to continue.

password.title: Update Password
password.requirements: Your new password should be at least 8 characters in length and unique to this website.

email.title: Update Email Address
email.updated: Your email address has been updated.

twoFactor.title: Two-Step Verification
twoFactor.button: You do not currently have two-step verification enabled on your account. Click the button below to begin configuring it.
twoFactor.enabled: Two-factor authentication has been enabled on your account! From now on, when logging in, you will be required to provide the code generated by your device.
twoFactor.disabled: Two-factor authentication has been disabled on your account. You will no longer be prompted to provide a token when logging in.

setup.title: Setup two-factor authentication
setup.help: Can't scan the code? Enter the code below into your application:
setup.description: Scan the QR code above using the two-step authentication app of your choice. Then, enter the 6-digit code generated into the field below.

tokens.title: Recovery Tokens
tokens.description: Store these tokens in a safe location. If you lose access to your phone you can use these backup tokens to sign in.

description.label: Description
description.help: A description of this API key.

allowedIps.label: Allowed IPs
allowedIps.help: Leave blank to allow any IP address to use this API key, otherwise provide each IP address on a new line.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.none: No API keys exist for this account.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete API Key
deleteConfirm.message: All requests using the {{identifier}} key will be invalidated.

modal.title: Your API Key
modal.description: The API key you have requested is shown below. Please store this in a safe location, it will not be shown again.

keys.title: SSH Keys
keys.none: No SSH Keys exist for this account.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete SSH Key
deleteConfirm.message: Removing the {{name}} SSH key will invalidate its usage across the Panel.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noServers: There are no servers associated with your account.
dashboard.noOtherServers: There are no other servers to display.

alerts.nodeMaintenance: The node of this server is currently under maintenance and all actions are unavailable.
alerts.installing: This server is currently running its installation process and most actions are unavailable.
alerts.transferring: This server is currently being transferred to another node and all actions are unavailable.

killConfirm.title: Forcibly Stop Process
killConfirm.message: Forcibly stopping a server can lead to data corruption.

uploadModal.title: Drag and drop files to upload.
uploadModal.error: Folder uploads are not supported at this time.

createDirectoryModal.title: Create Directory
createDirectoryModal.name: Name
createDirectoryModal.creating: This directory will be created as

fileNameModal.title: File Name
fileNameModal.description: Enter the name that this file should be saved as.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Files
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteConfirm.permanent: This is a permanent action and the files cannot be recovered.

renameModal.title: File Name
renameModal.description: Enter the new name and directory of this file or folder, relative to the current directory.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {{type}}
deleteConfirm.message: You will not be able to recover the contents of

fileUploads.title: File Uploads
fileUploads.description: The following files are being uploaded to your server.
fileUploads.uploading: {{count}} files are uploading, click to view

fileNameModal.title: File Name
fileNameModal.description: Enter the name that this file should be saved as.

databases.title: Databases
databases.noDatabases: It looks like you have no databases.
databases.cannotCreate: Databases cannot be created for this server.
databases.allocated: {{current}} of {{limit}} databases have been allocated to this server.

create.title: Create new database
create.databaseNameDescription: A descriptive name for your database instance.
create.connectionsFromDescription: Where connections should be allowed from. Leave blank to allow connections from anywhere.

delete.title: Confirm database deletion
delete.description: Deleting a database is a permanent action, it cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the
delete.description2: database and remove all associated data.
delete.confirmDescription: Enter the database name to confirm deletion.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.noSchedules: There are no schedules configured for this server.

edit.scheduleNameDescription: A human readable identifier for this schedule.
edit.cronDescription: The schedule system supports the use of Cronjob syntax when defining when tasks should begin running. Use the fields above to specify when these tasks should begin running.
edit.showCheatsheetDescription: Show the cron cheatsheet for some examples.
edit.onlyWhenOnlineDescription: Only execute this schedule when the server is in a running state.
edit.scheduleEnabledDescription: This schedule will be executed automatically.

delete.title: Delete Schedule
delete.description: All tasks will be removed and any running processes will be terminated.

task.timeOffsetDescription: The amount of time to wait after the previous task executes before running this one. If this is the first task on a schedule this will not be applied.
task.continueOnFailureDescription: Future tasks will be run when this task fails.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm task deletion
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

users.title: Users
users.noUsers: It looks like you don't have any subusers.

edit.userEmailDescription: Enter the email address of the user you wish to invite as a subuser for this server.
edit.permissionNotice: Only permissions which your account is currently assigned may be selected when creating or modifying other users.

delete.title: Delete this subuser?
delete.description: Are you sure you wish to remove this subuser? They will have all access to this server revoked immediately.

control.title: Control
control.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to control the power state of a server, or send commands.
control.console: Allows a user to send commands to the server instance via the console.
control.start: Allows a user to start the server if it is stopped.
control.stop: Allows a user to stop a server if it is running.
control.restart: Allows a user to perform a server restart. This allows them to start the server if it is offline, but not put the server in a completely stopped state.

user.title: User
user.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to manage other subusers on a server. They will never be able to edit their own account, or assign permissions they do not have themselves.
user.create: Allows a user to create new subusers for the server.
user.read: Allows the user to view subusers and their permissions for the server.
user.update: Allows a user to modify other subusers.
user.delete: Allows a user to delete other subusers on the server.

file.title: File
file.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to modify the filesystem for this server.
file.create: Allows a user to create additional files and folders via the Panel or direct upload.
file.read: Allows a user to view the contents of a directory, but not view the contents of or download files.
file.read-content: Allows a user to view the contents of a given file. This will also allow the user to download files.
file.update: Allows a user to update the contents of an existing file or directory.
file.delete: Allows a user to delete files or directories.
file.archive: Allows a user to archive the contents of a directory as well as decompress existing archives on the system.
file.sftp: Allows a user to connect to SFTP and manage server files using the other assigned file permissions.

allocation.title: Allocation
allocation.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to modify the port allocations for this server.
allocation.read: Allows a user to view the allocations assigned to this server.
allocation.create: Allows a user to assign additional allocations to the server.
allocation.update: Allows a user to change the primary server allocation and attach notes to each allocation.
allocation.delete: Allows a user to delete an allocation from the server.

startup.title: Startup
startup.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to view and modify the startup parameters for this server.
startup.read: Allows a user to view the startup variables for a server.
startup.update: Allows a user to modify the startup variables for the server.
startup.docker-image: Allows a user to modify the Docker image used when running the server.

database.title: Database
database.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to manage databases for this server.
database.create: Allows a user to create a new database for this server.
database.read: Allows a user to view the database associated with this server.
database.update: Allows a user to rotate the password on a database instance. If the user does not have the view_password permission they will not see the updated password.
database.delete: Allows a user to remove a database instance from this server.
database.view_password: Allows a user to view the password associated with a database instance for this server.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to manage schedules for this server.
schedule.create: Allows a user to create new schedules for this server.
schedule.read: Allows a user to view schedules and the tasks associated with them for this server.
schedule.update: Allows a user to update schedules and schedule tasks for this server.
schedule.delete: Allows a user to delete schedules for this server.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to modify server settings.
settings.rename: Allows a user to rename this server and change the server description.
settings.reinstall: Allows a user to trigger a reinstall of this server.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Permissions that control a user's ability to manage server backups.
backup.create: Allows a user to create new backups for this server.
backup.read: Allows a user to view all backups that exist for this server.
backup.update: Allows a user to lock or unlock backups for this server.
backup.delete: Allows a user to delete backups for this server.
backup.download: Allows a user to download backups for this server.
backup.restore: Allows a user to restore a backup for this server.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Permissions that control a user's access to the server activity logs.
activity.read: Allows a user to view the activity logs for the server.

backups.title: Backups
backups.noBackups: It looks like there are no backups currently stored for this server.
backups.noBackupsPage: Looks like we've run out of backups to show you, try going back a page.
backups.noBackupLimit: Backups cannot be created for this server because the backup limit is set to 0.
backups.backupsUsed: {{count}} of {{limit}} backups have been created for this server.

create.title: Create server backup
create.nameDescription: If provided, the name that should be used to reference this backup.
create.ignoredDescription: Enter the files or folders to ignore while generating this backup. Leave blank to use the contents of the .pteroignore file in the root of the server directory if present. Wildcard matching of files and folders is supported in addition to negating a rule by prefixing the path with an exclamation point.
create.lockedDescription: Prevents this backup from being deleted until explicitly unlocked.

unlockModal.title: Unlock "{{name}}"
unlockModal.description: This backup will no longer be protected from automated or accidental deletions.

restoreModal.title: Restore "{{name}}"
restoreModal.description1: Your server will be stopped. You will not be able to control the power state, access the file manager, or create additional backups until completed.
restoreModal.truncateLabel: Delete all files before restoring backup.

deleteModal.title: Delete "{{name}}"
deleteModal.description: This is a permanent operation. The backup cannot be recovered once deleted.

network.title: Network
network.allocationsUsed: You are currently using {{count}} of {{limit}} allowed allocations for this server.

deleteAllocation.title: Remove Allocation
deleteAllocation.description: This allocation will be immediately removed from your server.

startup.title: Startup Settings
startup.dockerImageDescription: This is an advanced feature allowing you to select a Docker image to use when running this server instance.
startup.customDockerImage: This server's Docker image has been manually set by an administrator and cannot be changed through this UI.

MINECRAFT_VERSION.name: Minecraft Version
MINECRAFT_VERSION.description: The version of minecraft to download. Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

SERVER_JARFILE.name: Server Jar File
SERVER_JARFILE.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

BUILD_NUMBER.name: Build Number
BUILD_NUMBER.description: The build number for the paper release. Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

VANILLA_VERSION.name: Minecraft Version
VANILLA_VERSION.description: The version of Minecraft Vanilla to download and use.

FORGE_VERSION.name: Forge Version
FORGE_VERSION.description: The version of Minecraft Forge to install. Use recommended to install the recommended version.

MC_VERSION.name: Minecraft Version
MC_VERSION.description: The version of Minecraft to install.

STARTUP.name: Startup Command
STARTUP.description: The startup command for your server.

DL_VERSION.name: Version
DL_VERSION.description: The version to download and install.

sftp.title: SFTP Details
sftp.passwordNotice: Your SFTP password is the same as the password you use to access this panel.

reinstall.title: Reinstall Server
reinstall.description: Reinstalling your server will stop it, and then re-run the installation script that initially set it up.
reinstall.warning: Some files may be deleted or modified during this process, please back up your data before continuing.
reinstall.confirmMessage: Your server will be stopped and some files may be deleted or modified during this process, are you sure you wish to continue?
reinstall.successMessage: Your server has begun the reinstallation process.
